steps.title: Identify the required logical relationship
steps.content: The passage uses “Granted” to acknowledge a limitation (the building's elaborate features couldn't go in a forest), then pivots to show that natural influences ARE visible. The transition word must express this “acknowledge but still” relationship.

steps.title: Match the transition word to the logic
steps.content: Still (choice B) means “nevertheless”—exactly the word needed to acknowledge one point while shifting to a contrasting observation. The other three don't work: Furthermore means “also,” Similarly means “in the same way,” and In other words means “that is”—but the sentence needs contrast, not addition or rephrasing. That matches choice B — B is correct.
